_publications._publicationTitle: Canonical Wnt/β-catenin signaling drives human schwann cell transformation, progression, and tumor maintenance.

_contextSnippet: Reduction in CTNNB1 by shRNA delayed the rate of tumor growth in the NF1-asociated cell line
resourceName: athymic Foxn1 nu/nu mice (Charles Rivers Laboratory)
details: CTNNB1 shRNA delayed tumor growth rate in NF1-associated cell line; GSK3B overexpression reduced tumor growth in sporadic MPNST cell line
